script_snippet: Have you ever wondered what would happen if you truly put God first in every part of your life for 30 days?
hero_subject: Hands of the protagonist resting on a blank journal at a kitchen table, hinting at a personal question.
image_prompt: Hands on a blank journal at a kitchen table, modern home.
negative_prompt: cluttered background, harsh fluorescent light, cartoonish, phone notifications visible
image_basis: high quality digital painting, spiritual contemplation, divine light, Hands on a blank journal at a kitchen table, modern home.

hero_subject: Protagonist's hand hovering over a muted phone on the table, a pause before action.
image_prompt: A hand hovering over a muted phone on a kitchen table.
negative_prompt: notifications, visible text on screen, messy background, bright neon colors
image_basis: high quality digital painting, spiritual contemplation, divine light, A hand hovering over a muted phone on a kitchen table.

hero_subject: Silhouette of the protagonist standing by a doorway, one foot forward as if deciding to commit fully.
image_prompt: Silhouette of a person in their 30s standing in a doorway, one foot forward.
negative_prompt: busy patterns, theatrical costumes, multiple people, anachronistic objects
image_basis: high quality digital painting, spiritual conviction, divine light, Silhouette of a person in their 30s standing in a doorway, one foot forward.

hero_subject: Protagonist's hand turning a calendar page marked with a Sunday, refusing limited devotion.

script_snippet: but they keep putting God second, third, or even last.
